---
title: "About Me"
sidebar: false 
---

# Education

-   B.S., Industrial Engineering, Hacettepe University, Turkey, September 2021 - ongoing.

# Work Experience

## Employements

1.  TÜBİTAK BİLGEM YTE, Digital Transformation and Strategy Development Department, Scholarship Holder (Part-time), September 2024-ongoing

## Internships

1.  Tübitak Bilgem YTE, Business Analysist Intern, June 2024- August 2024

# Projects

1.  Graduation Project at ASELSAN, November 2025 - ongoing
2.  Teknofest, 2022-2023

# Competencies

Jira, Confluence, Excel

# Hobbies

Playing Piano 🎹

# CV

[Click here to download my CV (PDF)](cv_melike.pdf)
